# Task: Fix event timestamps — store-cli.cjs zeros time component (#56)

> Task ID: FORGE-S11-T01
> Sprint: [FORGE-S11](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ committed
> Estimate: S

## Description

store-cli.cjs event writer sets startTimestamp/endTimestamp to date-only (T00:00:00Z), making durationMinutes always 0. Fix to use real ISO timestamps with actual time-of-day.
